description: Configure Wazuh to ingest logs from a legacy application at /var/log/finconnect/app.log (format: syslog/text) and detect brute-force attacks. For the 'FinConnect' program, extract the User, IP, and Status fields. Implement Rule 100205 with alert level 3 for 'Status=Failed' and Rule 100210 with alert level 10 to trigger when Rule 100205 occurs 5 times within 30 seconds from the same source IP. Verify the detection by simulating an attack.
